div.head: The Minister in Nicaragua (Long) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
Sir: I have the honor to transmit herewith translation of a Note No. 3, dated January 9, 1937,Not printed. from the Minister for Foreign Affairs
which in effect accepts for Nicaragua the conditions which served in allotting bridges to Guatemala, Honduras and Panama, and requests the three bridges named above.i. e., Sebaco, Maderas, and Esteli.

The Minister promises, immediately upon receipt of advice that each bridge has been authorized, to set aside the funds with which to provide the materials and perform the work that would fall to Nicaragua.
It is assumed that the Inter American Highway Office at San José has submitted or soon will submit full information in connection with each of these bridge projects.
